title: E-Commerce Platform
summary: A full-featured online store with product management, cart, and payment integration.
problem: Small businesses had no affordable way to sell products online with proper inventory management.
solution: Developed a complete e-commerce solution with an admin panel, product catalog, shopping cart, and Stripe payment integration.
impact: Processed over 500 orders in the first month

title: HR Management System
summary: An internal HR platform for managing employees, attendance, payroll, and leave requests.
problem: The HR department was overwhelmed by manual paperwork for attendance tracking and payroll calculations.
solution: Created a full HR portal with employee profiles, automated attendance tracking, leave approval workflows, and payroll generation.
impact: Saved 20+ hours per week for HR staff

title: Real-Time Chat App
summary: A real-time messaging application with rooms, private messages, and file sharing.
problem: Remote teams needed a lightweight, self-hosted chat tool without relying on expensive third-party services.
solution: Built a WebSocket-powered chat application with support for group rooms, direct messages, online indicators, and file uploads.
impact: Used by a team of 50+ daily

title: Inventory Tracker
summary: A smart inventory management system with low-stock alerts and supplier management.
problem: Warehouse staff had no visibility into stock levels and frequently experienced stockouts or overordering.
solution: Developed a real-time inventory dashboard with barcode scanning support, automated low-stock email alerts, and purchase order generation.

title: Task Management Board
summary: A Kanban-style project management tool for teams to plan, track, and deliver work.
problem: Development teams lacked a simple tool to visualize task progress and collaborate without context switching.
solution: Built a drag-and-drop Kanban board with task assignments, due dates, labels, and team comments synced in real time.
